_meta.description: Seed fixtures for the click-resolver micro-bench. Each case needs an image checked into fixtures/images/ and a labelled tap target. The harness annotates with the same crosshair the web client draws and calls providers.llm.click_to_subject against it.

field_reference.image_path: relative to this JSON file's directory
field_reference.x_pct: 0..1, normalized X of click point (origin top-left)
field_reference.parent_title: title of the page being clicked on (passed to VLM as context)
field_reference.parent_query: the original user query that produced the parent page
field_reference.groundable: false when the tap point is on a non-meaningful region (sky, decoration); used for the rejection-rate metric
field_reference.output_locale: optional locale code for non-English bench cases
field_reference.notes: free-text human notes about the case

how_to_add_cases: 1. Save the source illustration to fixtures/images/{case_id}.jpg
2. Pick a click point, record x_pct and y_pct
3. Write the expected subject phrase as a human reader would name it
4. Add alternate phrasings if there's reasonable ambiguity
